genre_preference.value: Italian films, monster movies, westerns, comedies
evidence: Love Italian Westerns.. I am such a fan.
One of the Best Italian Comedies ever... Put Roberto Benigni on the map...
A wonderful moment in time when I was growing up.
It makes me realize that great films do not just happen.
A wonderful two hours plus of entertainment...
It only gets better over time...
The craftsmanship that goes into a film like this never becomes dated.
I was hoping for a crisp razor sharp copy with the wonderful Morricone Score to boot.
Nothing Better than Norman Lear. he has set the 'standard' for entertainment so high.
If you are a fan of Eli Wallach and his work in Italy and Spain during the 60’s and 70’s, this is just the ticket.
A wonderful package. Well designed and laid out.
A heart warming story of how a young man's fantasy takes a very different road.
Too good for words.. His work still haunts us today.
It makes me realize that great films do not just happen.

summary: The user has a strong preference for Italian films, monster movies, and comedies, often appreciating their craftsmanship and emotional depth. They enjoy slower-paced narratives that evoke nostalgia and emotional resonance, while also valuing high production quality.
